title: Mistmaker
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Mistmakers''' were a type of creature native to [[Msst]]. They resembled large pink jellyfish, with the same painful sting. They used their tentacles to numb their victims, then drew the animal into the body of the bubble and chewed with their jagged teeth. They were noted to be resistant to blaster fire.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 1998-06-30 -->''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
